arts.ttl: Aston Villa are about to welcome 'new players' as Unai Emery receives boosts
arts.sum: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery expects Tyrone Mings and Boubacar Kamara to return to the matchday squad in "a few weeks." Emi Buendia, who missed the whole of last season with his own ACL injury, is yet to make a league appearance this term, but played in pre-season and also captained Villa in their 3-2 win over Fleetwood Town in the EFL Trophy earlier this month.

arts.ttl: Premier League can't win Man City case and Everton are the reason why
arts.sum: The Premier League's case against Man City starts Monday set against the backdrop of issues with Everton

arts.ttl: Liverpool coach John Heitinga aims brutal dig at former club Everton at Reds training session
arts.sum: John Heitinga made 140 appearances for Everton, but he's now happy to poke fun at his former club in his new role as an assistant coach to Arne Slot at Liverpool

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Aston Villa v Everton
arts.sum: Team form, absentees and our predicted XIs for Aston Villa v Everton The post FPL Gameweek 4 predicted line-ups: Aston Villa v Everton appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Amadou Onana sends emotional Everton message ahead of Toffees reunion with Aston Villa
arts.sum: Amadou Onana will come up against former club Everton for the first time since swapping Goodison for Villa Park - and admits his experience on Merseyside shaped him as a man

arts.ttl: Leon Bailey injury update ahead of Aston Villa vs Everton
arts.sum: In his press conference ahead of the Premier League clash with Everton on Saturday (5:30pm), Villa manager Emery didn't completely rule Bailey out of making the squad. Unai Emery hasn't ruled Leon Bailey out of Aston Villa's clash with Everton, but admits the winger is a doubt to feature.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa may ‘have to’ sell key players to avoid PSR breach
arts.sum: Aston Villa may be forced to sell players soon in order to stay compliant with Premier League Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR), according to finance expert Stefan Borson. Villa have vigorously backed manager Unai Emery in recent years, with Amadou Onana, Ian Maatsen, Pau Torres and Jhon Duran among his most costly acquisitions at the […] The post Aston Villa may ‘have to’ sell key players to avoid PSR breach appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why Villa went for Onana from Everton
arts.sum: Amadou Onana has already matched his best Premier League scoring season for Everton by getting the opening goal in each of Aston Villa's two wins so far. He has the chance to make it three against his former club at Villa Park on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Dyche retains full backing of Everton hierarchy
arts.sum: Sean Dyche still has the full backing of the Goodison Park hierarchy, including majority shareholder Farhad Moshiri, despite a disappointing start to the season.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa make Villa Park changes for Everton following complaints
arts.sum: Aston Villa have been working over the last three weeks to resolve some of the issues at Villa Park which marred the club's first home game of the season . The club believe the use of digital tickets rather than physical copies will eventually increase the speed of entry for fans, giving less time queuing and more time experiencing Villa Park.
